bad: sai neg ma tri thal pres-pul ras meda ren avo
good: sai neg ma tri thal pres-buz ras meda ren avo
reason: pul is contour token, not texture token; buz is the intended texture token.

bad: sai neg ha tri abdo tak-pres pulse meda mem dis
good: sai neg ha tri abdo tak-pres pul meda mem dis
reason: pulse should be tokenized as pul.

bad: sai neu ma du chet press stan meda react non
good: sai neu ma du chet pres stan meda ren non
reason: press/react are English-like forms; canonical surface tokens are pres/ren.

bad: sai neg ha du chet tak-sha ras kei ren faz
good: sai neg ha du chet tak-sha ras kei ren faz
reason: neg is not the canonical valence token; use neg.

bad: si neu lo un heda pres fall meda mem res
good: si neu lo un heda pres fal meda mem res
reason: fall should be tokenized as fal.

bad: sai neg ha tri wh buz-pul osc li react dis
good: sai neg ha tri woba buz-pres osc li ren dis
reason: wh/react are invalid surface tokens; pul is contour token, not texture token.

bad: sai mix lo un df hol stan low unc non
good: sai mix lo un difa hol stan li unu non
reason: Mixed abbreviations and English-like forms replaced by canonical surface tokens.
